title: Elbow Noodles with Sauce
description: Perfectly tender elbow macaroni tossed in your choice of cheese sauce, butter sauce, or smooth marinara.

ingredients.item: smooth marinara, cheese sauce, or butter sauce
grated Parmesan or finely shredded mozzarella

steps.instruction: Bring a large pot of salted water to a full boil.
Cook elbow macaroni for 2–3 minutes beyond the package-recommended time (typically 10–12 minutes total) until completely soft.
Test by pressing a noodle against the roof of your mouth with your tongue — it should crush with no resistance.
Drain pasta thoroughly. Immediately toss with chosen sauce while hot.
Ensure every piece of pasta is well coated with sauce — dry pasta will stick together.
If pasta seems dry or is sticking, add 1–2 tbsp additional warm water or sauce and toss again.
Serve immediately while warm and well-moistened. Stir before eating.

notes: Cheese sauce: melt 1 tbsp butter, whisk in 1 tsp flour, add ½ cup milk and ¼ cup shredded cheddar — stir until smooth. Butter sauce: 2 tbsp melted butter, ¼ tsp garlic powder, salt.
